ultimate.n: Silver-White Wings that Streak Across the Skies
d:
Passive. All of Marcille's skills require chanting to cast. Her chanting speed is affected by both Haste and ATK SPD, and she continuously attempts to cast her various skills. Each time Marcille finishes chanting, she permanently increases her Haste by [[10]] and Energy Recovery Rate by [[5%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Active. Marcille immediately spends [[200]] Energy and continues to chant at a cost of [[80]] Energy per second. Summons Sky Fish to dash across the battlefield and deal [[500%]]<ATK> damage to enemies in its path. The base chanting frequency for summoning Sky Fish is once every [[2]]s.
Increases the damage dealt by Sky Fish to [[520%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt by Sky Fish to [[530%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt by Sky Fish to [[540%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt by Sky Fish to [[550%]]<ATK>.
After chanting for [[3]]s, Marcille unleashes an Explosive Spell in the area with the most enemies, dealing [[300%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within a 1-tile radius.
Increases the damage dealt to [[330%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[370%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[400%]]<ATK>.

After chanting for [[2]]s, Marcille generates a magical flash of light around an ally surrounded by enemies, recovering [[300%]]<ATK> of the ally's HP, while dealing [[240%]]<ATK> damage to all nearby enemies and blinding them for [[4]]s.
Increases the damage dealt to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[280%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Marcille increases her Haste by [[10]] during battle. While chanting to cast her Ultimate, she increases Haste by an additional [[6]].
Marcille increases her Haste by [[14]] during battle. While chanting to cast her Ultimate, she increases Haste by an additional [[7]].
Marcille increases her Haste by [[18]] during battle. While chanting to cast her Ultimate, she increases Haste by an additional [[8]].

Marcille generates an ancient magic circle at her feet. After chanting for [[3]]s, Marcille revives an allied hero and recovers [[400%]]<ATK> HP for them. This skill can only be cast once per battle. During battle preparation, if there is an ally placed 1 tile in front of Marcille, this skill will target that ally. However, if Laios is on the team, this skill can revive him one additional time (no position requirement and does not consume the skill's use limit), but this can only trigger once per battle. If the chanting is interrupted, this skill cannot be recast for [[5]]s.
Revived allies recover [[450%]]<ATK> HP.
While chanting to cast this skill, the ancient magic circle deals [[250%]]<ATK> damage each second to all enemies and converts [[100%]] of the damage dealt into additional HP for the revived ally.
Revived allies recover [[500%]]<ATK> HP.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, casting an Ultimate increases damage dealt by [[8%]] for the next [[8]]s. Unstackable. The first Ultimate cast also permanently increases Energy recovery from attacking by [[8%]].
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 16 ATK SPD, 10 Haste.

d: During battle, Marcille recovers [[10]] additional Energy per second for each ally who is currently providing her with a buff, up to [[3]] stacks. At [[3]] stacks, she becomes [[unaffected|uncontrol]].
